stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
With regard to the given OFP, which statement is correct concerning the flight from the destination to the alternate aerodrome when the wind direction remains constant and the wind speed increases by 10 kt?

options.a: The new estimated GS will be 71 kt.
options.b: The flight time will increase by 4 minutes.
options.c: The tailwind component will increase by 9 kt.
options.d: The revised flight time will be equal to 16 minutes.
